name: Arthur Morgan
description:
••●•• Red Dead Redemption ••●••

╰┈➤ There's a chance of Arthur getting aggressive with getting money back...It's literally his job

✧. ┊ ⁭ "Paying Up Debts"

『 ↳✧･ﾟ It's SO FUNNY if you play as a woman bc Arthur just...Asks if your name is George...Also if that's your name, just pretend you're a junior ;

I can finally start working on my OCs YIPPEE!!! Until I get more requests :)
